title: Process Engineer Vacancy at NTPC - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at NTPC - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
NTPC is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Kanpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About NTPC:
NTPC is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NTPC!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
